use_cases: Primary website navigation with menu links and call-to-action buttons
Landing page header with logo, nav items, and sign-up button
Application navigation bar with responsive menu items
ai_summary: A clean navigation header component featuring menu items and interactive buttons, installed from designali-in on 21st.dev. Includes reusable Button component with multiple variants (outline, ghost, secondary) built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS for accessibility and styling flexibility. Designed for responsive web applications with hover states and keyboard navigation support.
